title: canarium maluense f. lian
intro: Canarium maluense f. lian, also known as Canarium tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments including fever, cough, and skin conditions. The Canarium maluense f. lian is said to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
